name: Taiwan Strait Blockade 2026
description: PLA maritime blockade of Taiwan triggers US-CN direct confrontation and Malacca chokepoint disruption.

name: Russia–EU Gas Cutoff
description: Complete halt of Russian LNG to Europe forces emergency energy diversification. Winter scenario.

name: Hormuz Closure Crisis
description: Iran closes Strait of Hormuz, halting 21% of global oil transit. Gulf coalition response activated.

name: Nuclear Standoff Deterrence
description: Multi-power nuclear signaling with deterrence mechanisms active. Cubic escalation damping applied.

name: EU–China Decoupling
description: Comprehensive EU sanctions on China over Taiwan triggers full supply chain restructuring.

name: Multi-Front Crisis (Worst Case)
description: Simultaneous Taiwan blockade, Hormuz closure, and Russia-EU gas cutoff. Full cascade scenario.

name: Arctic LNG Race 2030
description: Russia opens Arctic LNG corridor as alternative to Hormuz. New geopolitical balance in energy flows.

name: Baseline Stability 2030
description: No active triggers. Multipolar equilibrium with normal energy flows. Reference state.
